home.title: Heaven & Hell
home.description: A soul stands at the crossroads of eternity. Every choice matters. Some battles must be won before you can move on. Your fate is in the dice.

dice.label: Dice Roll
dice.defeat: Defeated. You rolled {result} — not enough. Gather yourself and try again.

email_check.title: Check your email
email_check.description: We sent a confirmation link to **{email}**. Click it to activate your account.

valerius.name: Valerius Bolt
valerius.vibe: 'I am the lightning and the thunder.'
valerius.combatStyle: High-mobility aerial attacks and piercing lightning spears.

thalassa.name: Thalassa 'The Root'
thalassa.vibe: 'Get out of my garden... and off my planet.'
thalassa.combatStyle: Crowd control with sentient vines and heavy staff slams.

krell.name: Krell the Unbreakable
krell.vibe: 'Does this portal look punchable? It looks punchable.'
krell.combatStyle: Raw physical might infused with crackling kinetic runes.

xandros.name: Archivist Xandros
xandros.vibe: 'I read about this in a book. It ends badly for you.'
xandros.combatStyle: Tactical conjuration, glyph traps, and long-range energy beams.

seraphina.name: Seraphina Noir
seraphina.combatStyle: Stealth, dual-wielding sacred daggers with a demonic edge.

system.title: Heaven & Hell
system.sign-in-description: Sign in to track your journey and connect with friends.

characterSelect.title: Choose Your Hero
characterSelect.subtitle: A Vanguarda da Terra
characterSelect.keyboardHint: ← → Arrow keys to navigate · Enter to confirm

share.text: I just reached "{title}" ({label}) in Heaven & Hell — a branching story of fate. #HeavenAndHell
